Anyone looking to upgrade their backyard BBQ setup ahead of summer can head over to Amazon and find the East Oak 30-inch Electric Smoker with built-in probe and viewing window for $254.99 shipped right now. So far in 2026, we’ve only seen discounts from its $300 full price to $270 that has repeated a few times since February, but now, you’re able to score a little more savings as summer is set to arrive. While we have seen the price go a bit lower in the past, you’re looking at a solid $45 markdown here to the best price we have tracked since mid-December. Head below to learn about what it can bring to your BBQ season.

We’re tracking huge savings from favorite pet brands like Stella & Chewy’s, Blue Buffalo, Native Pet, Earth’s Rated and more across just about every category you can think of. From food, treats, and toys to grooming gear, health essentials, apparel, accessories, and everyday pet care supplies, there’s a little something for any and every pet in the sale.

items.title: The budget-friendly and entry-level Gotrax Dolphin e-bike is back down at its $467 low right now
items.summary:
Amazon is giving folks another chance to jump on the budget-friendly Gotrax Dolphin 26-inch Electric Bike down at $467.49 shipped. Down from a $550 full price, we first saw this low price appear in 2026 at the end of March’s Big Spring Sale event and hold out for the first week of April, before repeating again near the end of April. Now, you’re getting another chance at the $83 savings for the all-time lowest price we have tracked, letting you upgrade your commute at far less of a cost than more premium brands.
